entry.title: Composio
entry.description: Integration platform for connecting AI agents and applications to external tools, APIs, auth, and workflows.
entry.seoTitle: Composio tool integrations for AI agents
entry.seoDescription: Composio connects AI agents and applications to external tools, APIs, authentication, and workflow integrations. HeyClaude adds source links, install steps,...
entry.author: Composio
entry.cardDescription: Tool integration platform for AI agents.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

Composio is relevant when agent products need durable integrations, auth flows, and action execution across third-party tools.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
